meta.defaultDescription: Bilingual real estate guidance and contact support.

home.title: Guidance for your next move
home.subtitle: Helping buyers feel more informed before taking the next step.
home.intro: Whether you are buying your first home or exploring a new neighborhood, Haydee helps you understand the process in plain language — in English or Spanish.

buyers.title: Buyer guidance
buyers.body: Learn what to expect at each stage, from pre-approval to closing, without the pressure.

local.title: Local insight
local.body: Get context on neighborhoods, timing, and next steps tailored to your goals.

bilingual.title: Bilingual support
bilingual.body: Ask questions and review options in the language you are most comfortable with.

home.closing: Ready to talk through your options? Reach out for a no-pressure conversation.

about.title: About
about.body: We help clients understand their options and feel confident before scheduling a meeting.
about.detail: Haydee Irizarry works with buyers who want clear guidance before making big decisions. The focus is education first — helping you feel prepared, not rushed.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Have a question about buying or want to schedule a conversation? Send a message and we will get back to you soon.

resources.title: Resources
resources.body: Helpful starting points while you explore your options.

checklist.title: First-time buyer checklist
checklist.body: A simple list of steps to review before you start touring homes.

questions.title: Questions to ask your agent
questions.body: Know what to ask so you can compare guidance and feel confident.

glossary.title: Mortgage terms glossary
glossary.body: Plain-language definitions for common words you will hear along the way.
